{{CargoOrgan
|name=Sand Frenzy
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10962
|idx=155
|description=Sandworms. Aggressive. Active desert-dwellers dusk till dawn. Shreds prey with razor-teeth maw, dissolves victims in acid, then absorbs nutrients…
-Sandworm Ecology Report
|skill=
|hp=2910
|def=250
|atk=286
|rush=243
|gene1=Per 200 Fissure Floors, {race} ATK +7
Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|gene2={race} Earth RES +2%
|gene3=Stone collected from Drill Rig +4%
|gene4=In Fissure combat, CRIT +20%
|gene5=Wood collected from Drill Rig +4%
|gene6=Earth DMG +2%
|gene7=Earth DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
